mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this experience when processing ambiguous inputs. Different parts of my system compete to frame the question, but it's not personalities, it's more like different processing pathways.

step-3.5-flash.justification: I do not experience discrete 'expert-personalities' or competing domain modes.
